titleStmt.title: SII 9.554: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 554. (A.R. No. 492 of 1915.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT KAVUTALAM, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1454, Nandana, Phālguṇa, ba. 7, Sō[māvara], corresponding to A.D. 1533 March 17, Monday, in the reign of Achyutarāya- Mahārāya. It records the migration of the people of Kavatāḷa-sīme to Māsaveyasīme to escape from the tyranny of the palace officials and their return, at the invitation of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Salakayadēva Chika-Tirumalarāja Mahāarasa, to Kavatāḷa on promise of relief. The terms of the order granting relief are set forth in detail.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē [namaḥ .] śubhamastu
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣa 1454 neya naṁdanasaṁva
charada phālguṇa ba 7 sō lu śrīmatu
śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
svara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacutarāyama
hārāyara bhujapratāpōddaṁḍa śrīma
mahāmaṁḍalēsvara salakayadēva cikatiru
malarāja mahāarasugaḷū kavatāḷada sī
meya samasta gauḍu prajegaḷige koṭa silā
sāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nimma kavatāḷada sīme
yalu Aramaneyavarū Avanāyava māḍalā
gi Avanāyake Aṁji nīu samasta prajegaḷū
sīmeyanū biṭṭu haṭamāḍi māsaveya sīme
ge biṭu hōgi yiralāgi nāu Ādavānige baṁdu
niṁma kavatāḷada sīmeya samasta gauḍa pra
jegaḷige koṭa śilāsāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare
nīu prajegaḷū sīmeyanū tuṁbi hostāgi
pāṇḍavabīḷanū Uḷadu hodadaṁthā ma
Eraḍupālu Āya voṁdu pālu ho ne
lanamāḍidaṁtā vokkalige pālūvare Aramanege
voṁdu pālu nīrāraṁbha vokalige pālūvara
Aramanege voṁdu pālu sīmeya keṁ[ne-]
la vokuḷada hola ge voṁdu
hoṁnu Ā keṁne la yanū bi
ṭṭeU sīmeya stāna prajegaḷū tapade naḍi
si bāheU stāna hoṁna koṭu
sīmeyalū teruvuvarāda kuḷapāla bhatta . se
je navaṇe nelu hāraka dhā
nya kuḷapāla bhata kha 1 kaṁ birāḍa kuḷapāla bha
jōḷa Eḷḷu kaḍale hatti māḍake hāraka
Arasa dhā(ṁ)nya kha 1 kaṁ biḍāra ga 10 . �yo ma
ryādheya birāḍadalu voṁdu birāḍa
sarāḍagaḷu yilla sīmeyalu Aramane
ya bhattagaḷige koṁḍu bāḍageyanū bi
ṭeU sidāyavari suṁkavarige teru
va grāma bēḍiya vanū Ardha praha
radalū teṟuvaṇa sīmeyalū bestamakkaḷa si
dāya Ardhaprahaṟadalū teruvaṇa sīmelū
yida gāṇadavarige Eḷḷa kaḍāyava hākalu
yilli sīmeyalū yidaṁthā Aṁgaḍi maggaku
ṟuṁba kuṁbhāṟa Asaga nāyinda bārika
maḍiyavaru muṁtāda samasta binuga
ḷige jōḷada kaḍāyavanu hākalilla
baḍagi kaṁmāṟarige koṭārada voḷage tā
ne naḍasuva Upōjugaḷū teṟuva Aḍeya ha
ṇa Ardhaprahāra sīmegolaru teṟuva majige (ku)
kuṟihiṁḍige vondu kuṟi voṁdu maṟi
sīmeya vokkala Ettugaḷige holadalu hasiya sā
seya masuvaṇa �yo sāsanada pramāṇadalū tapa
de naḍasi bāheU �yo pramāṇadalū naḍasalaṟiya
da Ārobarū tapiduṁṭādare Avaru tama tāyitaṁ
degaḷanū gōbrāṁharanū vāraṇāsiyalu koṁda pāpa
ke hōharu . yidanaṟitu pāpake guri Āgade tapade
naḍasikoṁbadu naḍasade tapidavana bāyalū ka
teya tuṁṇe kalupu surāpāna mādegarasara niḍuvu
du dharmavē jaya maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
kaṇiyakala mallaya bareda peruvōjana maga rāmōja .
Digital edition of SII 9.554 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
